title: Rounded Yeasty Korean Tofu Jeon
description: A yeasty and tender Korean dish featuring sansho, cooked in a clay pot and served in a dolsot stone bowl, perfect for a weeknight dinner

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornstarch, yeast, sansho powder, and salt
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture
Heat the vegetable oil in a large clay pot over medium heat
Add the coated tofu to the pot and cook until golden brown on all sides
Remove the tofu from the pot and set aside on a plate
In the same pot, add the chopped scallions and cook until fragrant
Add the soy sauce and rice vinegar to the pot and stir to combine
Return the cooked tofu to the pot and toss to coat with the sauce
Transfer the tofu and sauce to a dolsot stone bowl and serve hot
